rouge.name: Rouge

findings: F1/F2 (P1) burst Max-HP grants DOUBLE-COUNTED (casterMaxHpPct 22 + 22.5 = 44.5% vs kit max 30.02; Double Sword Coin in both skill2+burst) — blast radius = atkOfMaxHpPct consumers (cinderella/maiden), consistent with ~1.060. Backfilled empty unmodeled

rouge.evidence: Positional + Max-HP grant rebuilt from run-E e/e2/e3 videos; coin values timeline-averaged; 1.02

skill1: Activates after landing 8 Full Charge attack(s): the Max HP granted (5% of caster's Max HP, 5 sec) cannot be restored — the no-restore qualifier is inert (no HP pool / healing modeled); the grant itself IS modeled (as a passive time-averaged 2.3 ⚑)
skill2: Activates after landing 30 Full Charge attack(s) while in Sword Coin state: grants self and 2 ally unit(s) on both sides the Shield Coin — Damage Taken ▼ 15.2% continuously (defensive; boss deals no damage in v1)

Coin state progression itself (Sword Coin → Shield Coin at 30 Full Charges → Double Sword Coin at 5 Burst uses in Shield Coin) is not tracked as engine state; it is absorbed into ⚑ timeline-averaged values

records.comp: PE2 elec DPS RERUN w/ video (boss Water)
